CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sample_string VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, sample_string) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, sample_string) VALUES (2, 'test string with spaces');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, sample_string) VALUES (5, 'sample with char a');
SELECT strchr(sample_string, 'h') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT strchr(sample_string, 's') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT strchr(sample_string, '1') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT strchr(sample_string, '@') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT strchr(sample_string, 'z') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT strchr(sample_string, 97) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE strchr(sample_string, 'x') IS NULL;
SELECT id, sample_string, strchr(sample_string, ' ') AS first_space_index FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, sample_string, strchr(sample_string, 't') AS first_t_index FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1,2,3);
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE strpos(sample_string, 'a') < strpos(sample_string, 't');
SELECT sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE strchr(sample_string, ' ') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE strchr(sample_string, CAST(101 AS CHAR)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE strchr(sample_string, 'sample') IS NOT NULL;
